{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610888036235182873","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一开始选择的世界太过冷门。[微笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772056768,"group_id":"7600642581319388185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxBrrakeDV3/rpdk4RPiPboGPjC/A6oj8CK3Csovfyf1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7387ed8bcf0d41ae9bfc026fe0229c67~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882263&x-signature=gQYg7eb%2BbNGWfGDl7rmf8PQaNxI%3D","user_id":"4375710117142621","user_name":"无限永恒星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4375710117142621","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":16,"fan_ranklist_title":"若见之","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600642581319388185","book_info":{"abstract":"尤显赫穿越到一个类似于日漫异世界的世界，这个世界有魔物，有冒险者，有地下城，有迷宫，有秘境，有神明。
所有人都有职业，有等级，做任何事情都有熟练度，进度条。
勇者传说已经远去，但是魔王传说却近在眼前。
然而，当他升级的时候，他才发现，自己原来是有金手指的！
当数据化力量被分享到诸天万界，无穷世界终于迎来一个做任何事情都没有瓶颈的超级天才。
